title: MobMoney
description: This plugin makes killing various mobs valuable for which you will receive money
body:
## MobMoney
Please make sure you have dependency plugins as Vault 2.1 economy plugins required!

MobMoney is a Minecraft plugin that rewards players with money for killing mobs, offering a configurable and customizable economy system. Compatible with Minecraft versions from **1.8 up to 26.х**, it integrates with **Vault** to support various economy plugins.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aec9a47c2015c430ef4203fe9382afbfeb0dfd5.png)

---

## Key features include

* Players earn virtual money upon killing mobs, with rewards customizable per mob type.

* Supports configurable messages and action bar notifications to inform players of their earnings.

* Options to enable or disable rewards for mobs spawned from spawn eggs or monster spawners.

* Ability to restrict rewards for players in creative mode.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c46a159bf72b07cb242fcc2e95760267b3d7c11.png)

* Configurable pickup sounds and volumes for money collection.

* Chance settings for mobs to drop money items, allowing for event-based double drops.

* Metrics collection to track plugin usage.

* Commands for reloading the configuration and toggling messages.

* Support for economy stealing in PvP scenarios, configurable by server admins.

---

## Description

This plugin is ideal for **survival, PvE, and PvP servers**, enhancing gameplay by incentivizing mob hunting and adding economic depth.

It is simple to install! But Don't forget to donwload dependacy plagins very important! — just place the **.jar** in the **plugins folder**, configure the settings, and restart the server.

---
